title: rochelia marginata
intro: Rochelia marginata is a perennial plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae), native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Rochelia marginata include reducing inflammation and pain, treating various infections, and supporting digestive health. Rochelia marginata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine to make ointments and creams for skin conditions.
